prerequisites: Administrator access to a Pipeliner CRM (Coevera) space, which is required to open the administration area, create an API application, and reveal its credentials.

An API application created under the Unit, Users & Roles tab in the administration area; creating it and clicking Show API Access generates the Username, Password, Space ID, and Service URL used by this connector.
Values for the required config fields service, spaceid, and username, plus the password that forms the secret half of the Basic authentication credential pair.

authMethods.name: Basic authentication (username and password)
authMethods.summary: The Pipeliner CRM API uses HTTP Basic authentication consisting of a username and password. Set the username field and the secret password field to the Username and Password generated for your API application via Show API Access. These credentials are generated only once, so store them securely. The accompanying spaceid and service values identify your space and API service and are part of every request URL.

setupSteps.title: Create an API application in Pipeliner
setupSteps.body: Sign in to your Pipeliner CRM (Coevera) space at https://crm.coevera.com, select your space, and go to the administration area. Under the Unit, Users & Roles tab, open Applications and create a new application for this integration.

setupSteps.title: Reveal and record the API credentials
setupSteps.body: Open the application and click Show API Access to view the generated Username, Password, Space ID, and Service URL. The Username and Password are generated only once, so copy all four values now and store them carefully.

setupSteps.title: Fill in the connector configuration
setupSteps.body: Set username to the generated API Username and password to the generated API Password (the secret used for Basic authentication). Set spaceid to your Space ID and service to the Service URL value from the application. The username, spaceid, and service fields are required.
